A quick tip for Gluten free or Dairy-free shoppers: 
1. Most all the gluten free products in this Goleta store are located in one section. Ask a friendly service team member for help to show you where to go. 
2. Gluten-free Pancakes and spaghetti noodles/pasta can be found next to he regular stuff at most Albertsons stores. 
3. Dairy- free milks can be found in the baking section* and if they can order most anything for you. 
4. Soy, Miso, and Daiya cheese is in vegetable section.
